pi_items.source: WooCommerce REST API v3 documentation confirms status values as 'active', 'paused', 'disabled' (lowercase); task.json (line 18), verifier.py default (line 86)
WooCommerce REST API v3 and Code Reference confirm 'order.created' as valid core topic with resource.event format; task.json (line 19), verifier.py default (line 87)

WooCommerce documentation confirms delivery_url as HTTPS URL endpoint; .example.com is reserved TLD per RFC 2606 for example documentation; task.json (line 20), verifier.py default (line 88), export_result.sh (line 36)
WooCommerce documentation confirms secret as optional arbitrary string for HMAC-SHA256 authenticity verification; task.json (line 21), verifier.py default (line 89)

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values are verified synthetic test data. The task specifies exact webhook configuration parameters: name 'Fulfillment Dispatch - New Orders', status 'active', topic 'order.created' (WooCommerce-standard format), delivery URL to .example.com reserved domain, and a 16-character secret string. All values are consistent across task.json, verifier.py, and export_result.sh. The topic 'order.created' and status 'active' are confirmed as valid WooCommerce webhook properties. The delivery URL uses the reserved .example.com TLD appropriate for example documentation. Data is entirely synthetic (hardcoded test values, not from external real sources).
